utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: You guys ! It was bananas , cream , and beef ! I ... I just cannot believe that you ate that so that I would not feel bad !

emotion_cause.span: 1_you ate that so that I would not feel bad !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well actually , I ... I did not eat mine . It is still in the bathroom .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: No it is not , I ate that .

utterances.speaker: Mrs. Geller
utterances.text: Well we left ours in Monica bedroom .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Nope , got it and I got yours too .

emotion_cause.span: 5_got it and I got yours too .
